name.description: The resource name of the Feature Group Feature.

feature_group.description: The name of the Feature Group.

region.description: The region for the resource. It should be the same as the feature group's region.

labels.description: The labels with user-defined metadata to organize your FeatureGroup. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

version_column_name.description: The name of the BigQuery Table/View column hosting data for this version. If no value is provided, will use featureId.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
